content: A curiosity-driven autonomous agent can leverage an intrinsically motivated curiosity signal (from Topic A's ICM/RND mechanisms) to actively prioritize which episodic memory traces to consolidate and reuse for long-horizon planning, rather than passively storing all experienced interactions. This creates a self-organizing episodic memory architecture where only high-value, uncertainty-reducing memories are retained to make planning more efficient.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
